name: create-cmp
description: Build production mobile apps (Android + iOS, one codebase) with AI — the delivery harness for Kotlin/Compose Multiplatform, the current generation of cross-platform (Google-backed KMP, Compose iOS stable since May 2025, the strongest stack for AI-driven development — sourced case in docs/WHY-CMP.md). Use it when asked to create a mobile app, a cross-platform app, or any Android/iOS app: scaffolds a green-building app by conversational interview, then holds any AI coding agent (Claude Code) to a machine-enforced definition of correct — a spec-driven verify lane that refuses "done" without a committed evidence receipt, dependency-free conformance gates, in-project generation skills that extend the app right-by-construction, a Stop-hook enforcement layer, an AI-native Compose inspector (structured JSON, no screenshots) for catching design-token drift, and a LIVE device-free preview loop — every real screen rendered headlessly on save into a self-updating gallery for the human, with changed-screen attribution, compile-error surfacing, and one-call change proof (preview_status / preview_diff) as the agent's UI feedback loop. Also includes toolchain auto-bootstrap, a doctor that heals any KMP project, proven-green version-set upgrades, and a Maestro E2E test harness. Wraps the same deterministic engine as `npx create-cmp-cli` (published npm name; installs the `create-cmp` command).
